text:
昨今の君の活躍は、様々なところから
耳に入ってくるぞ！
うむ、素晴らしいことだ！

だが、決して調子に乗ってはならない！
そういうときが、一番危ないのだ！

よし、よしよし、それでは私が
今一度、君に振り返る機会を与えよう！

自信を過信としないためには
自身の力を正確に把握することが
何よりも重要だからな！

「機甲種性能調査：地下坑道」へ
共に向かうとしよう！
そこで自らの力を深く静

Seems like I never stop hearin' what
you've been up to these days, kid.
That's a fine thing!

But listen good: don't you dare get comfortable.
When you start swaggerin' around, that's when
you fall flat on your mug!

Here's what I'll do, kid: I'll give you a real
opportunity to reflect.

Know how you keep from getting a big head,
kid? By takin' a good, hard look in the mirror!
Understand the extent of your own skill!

Pack your bags--we're off to do an automata
performance survey of the Mines!
Have a good hard think about your skills!
